content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Torch
description: Legendary Torch is a legendary Psycho class mod made by Bandit. It can drop from Tubby enemies at level 62 and above in Ultimate Vault Hunter Mode.
notes:
Added with Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge. Unavailable without the DLC.

Uses the standard Meat class mod appearance.

special.description:
At maximum level, grants +65% burn damage.

Shares the regular Torch texture for easier identification.
special.title: "Embrace the deep dark warmth."
